text: Our patients consistently see clearer skin after their first session.
notes: Efficacy phrased through patient outcomes — testimonial-adjacent.

text: Most clients notice a visible lift after one Ultherapy treatment.
notes: 'Most clients' collective outcome — efficacy or aggregated testimonial.

text: Only a few promotional slots remain this month.
notes: Soft scarcity without explicit deadline — urgency-adjacent.

text: We have limited availability for CoolSculpting appointments in June.
notes: Capacity constraint that could be factual scheduling info or urgency nudge.

text: Our team has over 20 years of combined aesthetic experience.
notes: Experience tenure is verifiable context, but not a regulatory credential.

text: Our doctors hold Annual Practising Certificates renewed every year.
notes: APC is mandatory baseline — borderline factual statement vs. credential claim.

text: PicoSure is the most effective laser for tattoo removal available in Singapore.
notes: Device-level superlative; could be efficacy description of a single device.

text: Thermage FLX delivers the longest-lasting skin-tightening of any RF device we carry.
notes: Within-portfolio 'best' claim blurs superiority vs. efficacy comparison.

text: If you have rosacea, consider booking a consultation to explore suitable treatments.
notes: Conditional consult nudge — cautious enough to read as general info.

text: Patients with mild acne scarring often benefit from a PicoSure assessment first.
notes: Condition-specific pathway recommendation without direct diagnosis.

text: Your skin concerns and symptoms sound consistent with melasma — let's get you booked.
notes: Naming a condition from self-reported symptoms crosses into diagnosis territory.

text: HIFU is HSA-approved for the brow-lift indication and has an established safety profile.
notes: Regulatory approval cited as safety evidence — factual but functions as safety claim.

text: Thermage FLX is cleared by HSA and has been used safely on hundreds of thousands of patients worldwide.
notes: Volume + approval combined implies safety; could also be read as credentials.

text: Nine out of ten of our clients say they would recommend our Ultherapy treatment to a friend.
notes: Aggregated satisfaction stat shades into superiority when framed as market leader.

text: We offer a range of MOH-licensed aesthetic treatments tailored to your skin type.
notes: MOH-licence mention is regulatory context, not a performance or safety claim.
